steps.title: Understand the inequality
steps.content: We need a table where every (x, y) pair satisfies y < 6x + 2. For each x, compute the upper bound 6x + 2 and check that y is strictly less than that value.

steps.title: Test each table
steps.content:
• Choice A: at x = 3, y = 20, but 20 < 20 is false. Eliminated.
  • Choice B: at x = 5, y = 36, but 36 < 32 is false. Eliminated.
  • Choice C: 16 < 20, 28 < 32, and 40 < 44 all hold. Works.
  • Choice D: at x = 3, y = 24, but 24 < 20 is false. Eliminated.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
